title: Full Access to Monday on iPad
excerpt:
Hi! 
I frequently work on my iPad, but there are many features via the Monday app that won’t work on iPad. I would love full access to Monday on my iPad, like accessing my forms, adding new items, etc.

posts.author: NicolePasternack (Nicole Pasternack)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!

I frequently work on my iPad, but there are many features via the Monday app that won’t work on iPad. I would love full access to Monday on my iPad, like accessing my forms, adding new items, etc.
